description:
Add Position Relative Styling to Image Error Element in Program Card Header

Apply position:initial CSS property to the image-error element within the program-card-header component to fix layout positioning issues.

Requirements:
- Locate the image-error element inside program-card-header component
- Add position:relative CSS rule to the image-error class or element
- Verify the positioning change doesn't break existing layout or overlap other elements
- Test with actual error states to ensure image error display renders correctly
- Check responsive behavior across different screen sizes
- Ensure z-index stacking context works as expected if absolute-positioned children exist
title: Fix image-error positioning in program-card-header
